input.question: How many students have received more than one scholarship?

payload.question: How many students have received more than one scholarship?

output.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS students_with_multiple_scholarships
FROM (
  SELECT student_id AS student_id, COUNT(DISTINCT scholarship_id) AS scholarship_count
  FROM student_scholarships
  GROUP BY student_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT scholarship_id) > 1
) AS multi;

visualization.title: Number of students who received more than one scholarship

payload.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS students_with_multiple_scholarships
FROM (
  SELECT student_id AS student_id, COUNT(DISTINCT scholarship_id) AS scholarship_count
  FROM student_scholarships
  GROUP BY student_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT scholarship_id) > 1
) AS multi;
